headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -93.5)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 142% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 133 quotes and a remarkable 114 at strong intensity, meaning people are venting with real force today.
• At 73.4, frustrations sit in the upper half of their 184-day range (−0.5 to 171.6), signalling a notably elevated but not peak level of anger.
• Fears flipped sharply from +6.7 yesterday to −11.5 today despite 55 quotes, suggesting fear-related chatter is below average in engagement; optimism also dipped further into negative territory, leaving frustrations as the clear and unchallenged mood of the day.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
